---
title: "Photos"
subtitle: "Landscapes I've walked through. Click any image to enlarge."
page-layout: article
toc: false
---

::: {.photo-grid}

<a href="img/01.jpg" data-caption="Chengdu, Cat, and Yiping."><img src="img/01.jpg" alt="Houston spring morning" loading="lazy"></a>

<a href="img/02.jpg" data-caption="SiChuan, horse, and Xiangwei"><img src="img/02.jpg" alt="Galveston coast" loading="lazy"></a>

<a href="img/03.jpg" data-caption="Lavender"><img src="img/03.jpg" alt="Hermann Park" loading="lazy"></a>

<a href="img/04.jpg" data-caption="གསེར་རྟ་"><img src="img/04.jpg" alt="Big Bend" loading="lazy"></a>

<a href="img/05.jpg" data-caption="NENU"><img src="img/05.jpg" alt="Beijing street" loading="lazy"></a>

<a href="img/06.jpg" data-caption=" Yading Nature Reserve"><img src="img/06.jpg" alt="Rice University" loading="lazy"></a>

:::

<div class="lightbox-overlay" id="lightbox" role="dialog" aria-modal="true">
  <img src="" alt="" id="lightbox-img">
  <div class="lb-caption" id="lightbox-caption"></div>
</div>

<script>
(function() {
  const grid = document.querySelector('.photo-grid');
  if (!grid) return;
  const overlay = document.getElementById('lightbox');
  const overlayImg = document.getElementById('lightbox-img');
  const overlayCap = document.getElementById('lightbox-caption');

  grid.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
    const a = e.target.closest('a');
    if (!a) return;
    e.preventDefault();
    overlayImg.src = a.getAttribute('href');
    overlayCap.textContent = a.dataset.caption || '';
    overlay.classList.add('active');
    document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden';
  });

  const close = () => {
    overlay.classList.remove('active');
    overlayImg.src = '';
    document.body.style.overflow = '';
  };

  overlay.addEventListener('click', close);
  document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
    if (e.key === 'Escape' && overlay.classList.contains('active')) close();
  });
})();
</script>
